name: HWM_DATA_SOURCES_VL
query: SELECT BASE.DATA_SOURCE_ID, BASE.DATA_SOURCE_CODE, BASE.EXECUTABLE_CODE, TL.DISPLAY_NAME, BASE.IMPLEMENTATION_TYPE, BASE.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, BASE.ENTERPRISE_ID, BASE.MODULE_ID, BASE.CREATED_BY, BASE.CREATION_DATE, BASE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, BASE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, BASE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, BASE.SGUID FROM HWM_DATA_SOURCES_B BASE, HWM_DATA_SOURCES_TL TL WHERE BASE.DATA_SOURCE_ID = TL.DATA_SOURCE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
